title: You are not behind in life—you are being built.
script: Why does it feel like everyone else is living chapter twenty while you're stuck in chapter three? The quiet panic says you're already behind — that you should be further by now. Charles Darwin formed his theory of natural selection in 1838. He did not publish On the Origin of Species until 1859 — more than twenty years of evidence, revision, and restraint. What looked like delay was construction. Today, stop measuring your unfinished foundation against someone else's finished house. Do one honest hour of the work only you can do. You are not behind in life. You are being built.
